prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次近两年趋于稳定、2026年大幅扩招约15.5%以及本省物理类考生增加约3.6%等因素，扩招效应大 于考生增量，预计2026年最低位次较2025年有所后移（数字增大）；预测最低位次约43800名，区间43300–44300名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 28664 → 30449 → 42697 → 39416 → 39765. In 2023, there was a significant backward shift (about 12,248 places behind 2022). In 2024–2025, it stabilized around 39400–39800. The baseline for 2025 is about 39765. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 87 in 2021–2022, 89 in 2023, 94 in 2024, 97 in 2025, and 112 in 2026, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025. This substantial expansion puts downward pressure on rankings (numerical increase).

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Main Ranking, it is approximately 83rd, with recent rankings stable in the 81–85 range, placing it at an upper-middle level among 211 universities. Landscape Architecture is an A+ discipline (top in the country), and forestry-related disciplines such as Forestry and Forestry Engineering are strong, attracting applicants to related majors. In 2026, the reputation evaluation is slightly negative due to teacher ethics incidents, but the impact is limited. On Douyin, it ranks 51st in popularity (relatively hot), with moderate short video exposure. In terms of historical admission anomalies, there was a gap in liberal arts in Shaanxi in 2022, but no obvious gap was recorded for Physics Category in Guangdong.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular in society, matching well with the university's Physics Category enrollment majors. In 2026, the number of Physics Category examinees in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in recent years, the significant enrollment expansion of about 15.5% in 2026, and the increase of about 3.6% in provincial Physics Category examinees, the expansion effect outweighs the increase in examinees. It is expected that the minimum ranking in 2026 will shift backward (numerical increase) compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 43,800, with a range of 43,300–44,300.

If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 44,000), you should prioritize Tier 2 and safety Tier 3 majors, and be cautious with Tier 1 choices.
